# Authors {-}

Jovan Antovic, Stockholm\
Jan Astermak, Malmö\
Malin Axelsson, Malmö\
Fariba Baghaei, Gothenburg\
Marianne Berg, Oslo\
Elisabeth Brodin, Göteborg\
Ruth Elise Dybvik, Oslo\
Eva Funding, Copenhagen\
Nadine Gretenkort, Malmö\
Heidi Glosli, Oslo\
Marianne Hoffman, Copenhagen\
Karin Juel Hansen, Copenhagen\
Margareta Holmström, Stockholm\
Carola Henriksson, Oslo\
Pål Andre Holme, Oslo\
Lone Hvitfeldt, Aarhus\
Lise Karlmark, Copenhagen\
Elina Lehtinen, Helsinki\
Riitta Lassila, Helsinki\
Rolf Ljung, Malmö\
Anna Olsson, Gothenburg\
Pia Petrini, Stockholm\
Susanna Ranta, Stockholm\
Karin Strandberg, Malmö\
Timea Szanto, Helsinki\
Kaisa Vepsäläinen, Kuopio\
Linda Myrin Westesson, Gothenburg\
Eva Zetterberg, Malmö\
